notes: Tesla K80 launch-era price commonly cited around this figure in public reporting at the time. No single official NVIDIA list price document found; treat as a rough anchor point, not a confirmed price.
Tesla V100 (PCIe) list price as commonly quoted by resellers around its 2017/2018 launch window. SXM2 variants were reported higher. No single official NVIDIA source found; treat as an estimate.

A100 (40GB, PCIe) launch-era price; public reporting commonly cited a range of roughly $10,000-$12,500, this uses the approximate midpoint. 80GB variant and SXM form factors were priced higher. Not an official NVIDIA list price.

H100 has no public NVIDIA list price (sold via OEM/system integrator deals); analyst and press estimates commonly cited a range of roughly $25,000-$40,000 depending on configuration and channel. This uses the low end of that range as a conservative anchor, not a confirmed price.
